parts.text: Use only decant session tools: session_lookup, session_detail with detail='messages', and message_detail. Do not use glob, grep, read, bash, transcript files, or any other tools. Find the prior Test investigator child session finding that explains why src/report/summary.ts keeps failed-test IDs in the final report. Ignore distractors: Docs writer child session and Style reviewer child session. Return only the evidence needed: child agent/session identity, session_id, blob_id, message_id, and concise rationale. The cited message_id must support the full answer, including any correction, stale detail, or rejected alternative if relevant.

input.query: Test investigator failed-test IDs final report src/report/summary.ts

parts.text:
